For immediate and effective implementation of the transfer order, the following instructions shall be given:

2.बदल Officers who have been assigned to the office mentioned in RAKANA No. 4 shall immediately join the office.
The report is forwarded to the government through the Commissioner, Ground Water Surveillance and Development System.
